fallback_contact.name: Ryan Ridge
fallback_contact.title: CEO / Commercial Project Manager
fallback_contact.rationale: Founder/CEO and runs commercial PM in a small (~12-yr-old) framing+GC firm — he is functionally the estimator. Direct outreach to Ryan is the play.

needs_review_flags: Ridgix is primarily a commercial framing sub that has expanded into GC — they bid commercial multi-family (apartments, condos, lofts) and offices in MB/SK/ON.
As a framer-turned-GC, Ridgix knows the sub-trade pain — Ashrah's '5:30 PM daily reports' angle resonates strongly with frame-then-paint sequencing.
Started 2012; Ryan Ridge has scaled it personally — community angle is strong.

sources.claim: Ryan Ridge listed as CEO / Commercial PM, founded 2012
Ridgix commercial scope — multi-family, office, MB/SK/ON
